stemHtml: What is the purpose of Standard operating procedures (SOPs)?

options.a: SOPs ensure that anyone using them can understand any given operation or phase of flight.
options.b: SOPs act as a guideline which all crewmembers can use in an emergency.
options.c: SOPs ensure commonality which all crewmembers can follow and understand for any given operation or phase of flight.
options.d: SOPs act as a reminder to all crewmembers of correct operating procedures.
